ddls:
CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank or position of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of expertise or department */,
  "profile" TEXT /* URL to the faculty member's profile page */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* URL to the faculty member's personal homepage */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member was hired */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the faculty member */,
  "professional_history" TEXT /* Professional history of the faculty member */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the faculty member */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "research_statement" TEXT /* Research statement of the faculty member */,
  "cv_url" TEXT /* URL to the faculty member's CV */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes to the faculty profile over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research interest */,
  "interest_name" TEXT /* Name of the research interest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research interest */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the research interest */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the research interest */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the research interest was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_interests" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research interest */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member started showing interest in the research area */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member stopped showing interest in the research area (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_interests_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_interests_interest_id FOREIGN KEY ("interest_id") REFERENCES research_interests ("interest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal or conference where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member who authored the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal or conference */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes to the publication record over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the grant */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency providing the grant */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the grant */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the grant */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member who received the grant */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the grant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the grant (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes to the grant record over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator (PI) for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes to the project record over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the faculty member in the project (e.g., PI, Co-PI, Team Member) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member joined the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member left the project (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the collaboration */,
  "faculty_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first faculty member in the collaboration */,
  "faculty_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second faculty member in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes to the collaboration record over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_faculty_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id_2") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_faculty_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id_1") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., faculty, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date when the user last performed an activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes to the access log record over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "chair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department chair (a faculty member) */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the department was established */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes to the department record over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_chair_id FOREIGN KEY ("chair_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_departments" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member started in the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member left the department (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_departments_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)
